title: geum elatum var. elatum
intro: Geum elatum var. elatum, also known as the alpine avens, is a perennial plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geum elatum var. elatum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Geum elatum var. elatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
